scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
scripts.contracts:deploy:testnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url https://evmrpc-testnet.0g.ai --private-key $DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast
scripts.contracts:deploy:mainnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url https://evmrpc.0g.ai --private-key $DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast
